creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Mark D. Foster $B$5$s$O=q$-$^$7$?(B:
> Pav Lucistnik wrote:
>> Mark, what do you think about the patch filed on January 31?
>>
>>   
> I'm accepting the patch but resubmitting (attached) with minor 
> modifications. Please commit ASAP.
> Thanks again for patience, etc.
> 
> Also note that another patch is forthcoming due to security issue with 
> 0.2.4.1.

mt-daapd version 0.2.4.2 released

Small bug fixes for port order on mdns advertisement on intel macs, playlists based on bitrate. Primarly, though, this release is to apply fix for CVE-2008-1771.

* Patch for CVE-2008-1771 courtesy of Nico Golde and Debian security team
* Fix for wrong-endian port advertisement on intel macs
* Fix for playlists based on bitrate
